title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (g), PAGE 953, SUBPARAGRAPH 41, FOR THE PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, PARAGRAPHa,TITLE G, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2354 / 55 OG No. 35, 7307 (August 31, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2448, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (

g

), PAGE 953, SUBPARAGRAPH 41, FOR THE PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, PARAGRAPH

a,

TITLE G, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

g

), page 953, subparagraph 41, for the Province of Sorsogon, paragraph

a,

Title G, section three of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred is amended to read as follows:

"(

g

) Tuba-Malapoc Communal Irrigation

Project, Donsol

P25,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
